title: Agency Agent Index
description: Schema for AGENTS.json — the master index of all agent definitions generated by scripts/generate-index.sh.

generated.description: ISO date when the index was last regenerated (e.g. '2026-07-02').

agents.description: Complete list of agent entries, one per .md file in category directories.

id.description: Unique agent identifier derived from the filename (without .md extension).

name.description: Display name from the agent's YAML frontmatter 'name' field.

description.description: One-sentence summary from the agent's YAML frontmatter 'description' field.

emoji.description: Emoji character(s) from the agent's YAML frontmatter 'emoji' field.

subcategory.description: Subdirectory within the category, or empty string if the agent is directly in the category directory.

path.description: Relative path from the repository root to the agent .md file.

depends_on.description: Optional list of agent IDs this agent depends on.

nexus_roles.description: Optional list of NEXUS pipeline phases assigned to this agent.

total_categories.description: Count of unique category directories found during index generation.

total_agents.description: Total number of agent entries in the index.
